KPI Bluebook

Key Performance Indicators:

  • SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m3
  • Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
  • Cooling Water Delta-T (°C
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF
  • Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
  • Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
  • OEE %
  • kpi on spec rate
KPI Bluebook
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF
  • View page source

Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm Edit
Description
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF is a key performance indicator used to assess process efficiency and operational performance
Objective
  • The objective of Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF is to provide a clear measure that supports monitoring
  • decision making
  • and continuous improvement
Formula

Calculated directly from the inputs found in the code implementation.

See code context for implementation details.
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI can serve as an input to higher-level operational and performance dashboards
Input Measure
  • Derived from the variables used in the code calculation for this KPI
Unit of Measure hours per failure
Reporting Source Operations data sources such as historians, SCADA/DCS tags, and production logs.
Comments No additional comments or special considerations were provided for this KPI.

Code Context

1' KPI: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)

‘ Formula: mathrm{MTBF} = frac{mathrm{OperatingHours}}{mathrm{NumberofFailures}} Public Module KpiDemo

Public Function CalcMTBF(operatingHours As Integer, numberOfFailures As Integer) As Double
If numberOfFailures = 0 Then

Return operatingHours

End If Return operatingHours / numberOfFailures

End Function

End Module
